description: BTC halving cuts block reward 50% every ~210,000 blocks. Supply shock → appreciation 12-18mo post-halving.

phases.name: accumulation
phases.description: Post-crash bottom through halving. Smart money accumulates.
phases.implication: DCA steadily. Build position. No leverage.

phases.name: early_bull
phases.description: Post-halving supply shock building. Institutions enter.
phases.implication: Hold and add dips. Low leverage.

phases.name: late_bull_euphoria
phases.description: Peak euphoria zone. Blow-off top risk.
phases.implication: Watch for distribution signals. Tighten risk.

phases.name: distribution
phases.description: Smart money distributing. Lower highs begin.
phases.implication: Reduce leverage. Take profits on bounces.

phases.name: bear_market
phases.implication: DCA back in. No leverage. Accumulate.

key_insight: The halving cycle is a derivative of the global credit cycle. Supply schedule is fixed but demand is driven by liquidity conditions.
